content: The difference in intrinsic reward signal generation between ICM and RND for curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be used to benchmark how well 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory architectures retain and generalize uncertainty estimates about unseen environment states. This comparison reveals that memory architectures optimized for active sample selection do not inherently perform better at supporting the sustained, long-horizon intrinsic exploration that curiosity-driven RL requires.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
